ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_code" INTEGER /* Department code */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Department abbreviation */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the department */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the department */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_items" (
  "budget_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget item */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the budget item belongs to */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund type */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable type */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* As of date for the budget item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the budget item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the budget item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the budget item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_items_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_items_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_items_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_items_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure */,
  "budget_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item the expenditure belongs to */,
  "civilian" INTEGER /* Civilian personnel cost */,
  "uniformed" INTEGER /* Uniformed personnel cost */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the expenditure */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total expenditure amount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the expenditure */,
  "document_id" TEXT /* ID of the document or invoice related to the expenditure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the expenditure was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the expenditure record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_budget_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_item_id") REFERENCES budget_items ("budget_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund type */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fund type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fund type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fund type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable type */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the variable type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variable type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variable type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "time_period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the time period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the time period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, department head, auditor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget report */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the report belongs to */,
  "budget_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the budget report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the budget report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the budget report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_reports_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_reports_budget_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_item_id") REFERENCES budget_items ("budget_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_types" (
  "expenditure_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure type */,
  "expenditure_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expenditure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the expenditure type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the expenditure type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the expenditure type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_details" (
  "expenditure_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure detail */,
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure the detail belongs to */,
  "expenditure_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure type the detail belongs to */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expenditure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the expenditure detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the expenditure detail was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the expenditure detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_details_expenditure_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_type_id") REFERENCES expenditure_types ("expenditure_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_details_expenditure_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_id") REFERENCES expenditures ("expenditure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the audit belongs to */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was performed */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings of the audit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the audit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the audit was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the audit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_details" (
  "audit_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit detail */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit the detail belongs to */,
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure the detail belongs to */,
  "audit_amount" REAL /* Amount of the audit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the audit detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the audit detail was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the audit detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_details_expenditure_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_id") REFERENCES expenditures ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_details_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES audits ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_budgets" (
  "historical_budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical budget */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the budget belongs to */,
  "budget_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item the budget belongs to */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the budget */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the budget */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the historical budget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical budget was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical budget was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_budgets_budget_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_item_id") REFERENCES budget_items ("budget_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_budgets_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)
